== Notes for [[Item:Q103534|Q103534]] ==

* Zie [http://nl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Lopez_Gallo '''Wikipedia...''']
--------------------
Factor of King D. Felipe II in Flanders, Baron of Mala and Señor de Sicela and Formisela in the same states, born in Burgos (Spain), and Doña Catalina Garrido, a native of Burgos. Family tree of https://www.geni.com/people/Jean-Lopez-Gallo-heer-van-Male/6000000017560893252?from_flash=1&fsession_id=1524766019560&through=6000000017560893252

https://nl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Lopez_Gallo

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1206/1/0211-8998_n131_p573-578.pdf

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/591/1/1133-9284_n097_p241-254.pdf

According to page 670 of this article, Juan Lopez Gallo was brother of Alonso Lopez Gallo, since Alonso's wife, Barbara, was his niece, daughter of Juan Lopez Gallo

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=51945

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=53944

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=51279

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45592

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000017560893252

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
